originalTitle: RDDT Stock Plunges After Hours On S&P 500 Exclusion: But Wells Fargo Forecasts $550M AI Deal Jackpot
summary: Wells Fargo’s updated framework highlights Reddit’s data as well-positioned for the shift toward AI inference and agentic applications.
content: While constructive on the revenue potential from renewed deals, Fargo remains skeptical that Alphabet and OpenAI will offer meaningful additional traffic referrals back to Reddit’s platform.Reddit’s deals with both Google and OpenAI are slated for renewal this year. In 2025, Reddit’s content licensing deals with OpenAI and Google accounted for approximately $140 million in revenue, compared to the firm’s $2.2 billion total revenue.Wells Fargo analysts are turning more constructive on the impending renewals of Reddit’s (RDDT) high-profile content licensing agreements with Google parent Alphabet and OpenAI, forecasting that combined annual revenue from the deals could surge to $550 million upon renegotiation—more than quadrupling the current run rate of roughly $130 million.Shares of the company, however, fell 6% on Friday, clocking its worst day since late April, and fell a further 3% after hours after the stock was not included in the S&P 500 index despite speculation otherwise. Marvell Technology Inc (MRVL) and Flex Ltd (FLEX) were added to the index instead.Reddit Well Positioned For Shift Toward AI Inference, Says Wells FargoFargo’s updated framework highlights Reddit’s data as well-positioned for the shift toward AI inference and agentic applications. Yet Wells Fargo also flags a significant downside: the licensing pacts have emerged as a “substantial headwind” to user growth. Daily active user (DAU) growth on Reddit’s app has decelerated since the OpenAI deal was announced in May 2024, the firm said. Without the content being funneled into large language models, Reddit’s user metrics and stock valuation multiple “would be meaningfully higher,” analysts contended.The pressure from AI licensing is estimated to create a roughly $16 billion “overhang” on Reddit’s enterprise value, according to Wells Fargo. While constructive on the revenue potential from renewed deals, the bank remains skeptical that Alphabet and OpenAI will offer meaningful additional traffic referrals back to Reddit’s platform. It maintained an ‘Equal Weight’ rating on Reddit with a $176 price target.Why AI Deal Renewals MatterIn February 2024, Reddit struck a multiyear pact with Google worth approximately $60 million annually, granting the search giant access to Reddit’s Data API for real-time, structured user-generated content to train AI models and enhance search features.Three months later, in May 2024, Reddit announced a similar partnership with OpenAI—valued at an estimated $70 million per year—allowing ChatGPT and future products to surface enhanced Reddit content while giving OpenAI ongoing API access. The deals are now due for renewal in 2026.In 2025, Reddit’s content licensing deals with OpenAI and Google accounted for approximately $140 million in revenue, compared to the firm’s $2.2 billion total revenue. A whopping majority of the company’s revenue continues to be from advertising.In 2024, the two deals accounted for about 10% of the company’s overall revenue.Loop Capital Has More Bullish TakeOn Wednesday, Loop Capital reiterated its ‘Buy’ rating on Reddit and $260 price target. Analyst Rob Sanderson pointed to the company’s robust revenue momentum and “multiple drivers in place for a lengthy expansion.” At a current multiple of roughly 25 times expected 2027 earnings, the stock “looks particularly attractive,” the firm added.According to data from Koyfin, 21 of the 32 analysts covering Reddit rate it ‘Buy’ or higher, while 10 rate it Hold, and one rates it Sell. The 12-month average price target on the stock is $224.92, representing a potential upside of about 30% from the last close.How Did RDDT Retail Traders React?On Stocktwits, retail sentiment around RDDT stayed within the ‘neutral’ territory over the past week, while message volume jumped from ‘low’ to ‘normal’ levels.Stocktwits users were speculating that Reddit would be included in the S&P 500 index on Friday and expressed disappointment that it wasn’t.https://www.stocktwits.com/KnightKing/message/655625079https://www.stocktwits.com/honeyj/message/655615764https://www.stocktwits.com/SkipperBullDolphin/message/655624909RDDT stock has fallen 28% this year despite strong revenue growth, owing to softer logged-in user growth. Read More: SpaceX Lands $30B Google AI Compute Deal Ahead Of Record IPOFor updates and corrections, email newsroom[at]stocktwits[dot]com.
chineseTitle: RDDT 股价盘后暴跌，因标普 500 指数被排除在外：但富国银行预测 AI 交易大奖将高达 5.5 亿美元
chineseSummary: 富国银行更新的框架强调 Reddit 的数据为向人工智能推理和代理应用的转变做好了充分准备。
chineseContent: 尽管对续签交易的收入潜力持建设性态度，但 Fargo 仍对 Alphabet 和 OpenAI 是否会向 Reddit 平台提供有意义的额外流量转介持怀疑态度。Reddit 与 Google 和 OpenAI 的交易预计将于今年续签。到 2025 年，Reddit 与 OpenAI 和 Google 的内容许可协议收入约为 1.4 亿美元，而该公司的总收入为 22 亿美元。富国银行分析师对 Reddit (RDDT) 与谷歌母公司 Alphabet 和 OpenAI 即将续签的备受瞩目的内容许可协议持更加建设性的态度，预测重新谈判后，这些交易的年收入总额可能会飙升至 5.5 亿美元，是目前的四倍多运行率约为 1.3 亿美元。然而，该公司股价周五下跌 6%，创下 4 月下旬以来最糟糕的一天，尽管有其他猜测，但该股并未被纳入标准普尔 500 指数，盘后进一步下跌 3%。 Marvell Technology Inc (MRVL) 和 Flex Ltd (FLEX) 被添加到指数中。 Wells FargoFargo 表示，Reddit 为向 AI 推理的转变做好了准备。 富国银行的更新框架强调 Reddit 的数据为向 AI 推理和代理应用的转变做好了准备。然而，富国银行也指出了一个重大的缺点：许可协议已成为用户增长的“巨大阻力”。该公司表示，自 2024 年 5 月宣布 OpenAI 交易以来，Reddit 应用程序的每日活跃用户 (DAU) 增长已放缓。分析师认为，如果不将内容整合到大型语言模型中，Reddit 的用户指标和股票估值倍数“将会显着更高”。 AI 许可带来的压力预计会给 Reddit 的进入带来约 160 亿美元的“悬而未决”
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
